description:
Operating Area: Croatia, Montenegro, Greece (Ionian), Italy (Venice, Sicily)

CORSARIO is a luxury, family friendly yacht that combines the elegance of a traditional yacht with modern luxury. The Owners of this marvelous yacht have created something quite special. So far it has exceeded all expectations of a wonderful charter experience.

CORSARIO’s 48 meter length offers space for everybody. It doesn’t matter if you want a quiet place in the saloon, to sit on the foredeck with a good book, have a dip in the jacuzzi, take your yoga mat and do some stretches, or just sit on the decks sunbathing; with her three decks and plenty of seating areas, everyone will find space for themselves.

Yacht CORSARIO offers accommodation for up to 12 guests in six staterooms: one Master cabin, one VIP cabin, two double cabins and two twin cabins. There is also another en suite double cabin, the seventh cabin, on the top deck. This is a slightly smaller cabin, but can be used for groups that might want to maximise the available space. This cabin is also a great option for those clients that want a masseuse or a full-time nanny onboard. Each cabin comes with A/C, flat screen TV, wi-fi, safe box, audio surround system with separate controls, interphone and room service.

In the main salon, there are separate lounge and dining sections and a bar area, all with modern furnishings throughout and large windows with panoramic views.
The main deck is large and offers a great space, including lounging and dining areas. The flybridge has been a favourite area for many guests, with a sauna room and jacuzzi.
CORSARIO comes with an impressive selection of water toys, something for everyone: two stand-up paddleboards, kayaks, jetski, water-skiing gear, snorkelling equipment, fishing rods, sun mattresses and floating mats for all kinds of fun.

Just as outstanding as the boat itself, is the crew of eight. They are skilled, enthusiastic and dedicated to the yacht and their guests. Guests’ main take-away from their time on board has been how amazing the crew were. Captain Jure is larger than life and knows Croatian waters and islands like the back of his hand. He is a dedicated professional who has been on board since the beginning (2019). You never see him without a smile and his enthusiasm is infectious. Chef Luka is an exceptional cook. His food is not just delicious, but is also presented beautifully. Luka has been on board since 2019.

The whole crew gels really well. They are always around, always available but always discreet.

toys.label: Jet ski Sea Doo Spark 90 HP two seater (licence needed)
Expertise equipment (TRX bands, yoga matts, pilates balls, light dumbbells, jumping ropes, stretch bands)

crew.name: Jure Restovic
crew.bio:
Our amazing captain Jure comes from little fishing and shipbuilding village Milna on the island of Brač. His dad was a craftsman, shipbuilder and sailor, so he grew up near the boats and learned the same skills. He has worked on a small ship cruiser, big overseas cargo ships, then again as a sailor on yachts and finally as a captain, which was his lifelong dream. This will be his 25th year working on the sea.

Jure is a big fan of fishing and being on the sea, so don't be surprised when he takes you to the most mesmerising bays and coves where he catches fresh fish and calamari for you. He is also a very passionate craftsman and a guy
who can just fix anything. However, on top of all that he is simply an awesome human being - guests adore him and crew even more. He will show you how to truly enjoy everything that the Adriatic sea has to offer, while on Corsario.

FUN FACTS:
- Favourite Food: Octopus under the bell (peka).
- Best island in Croatia: My island of course: Brac.
- Favourite wind: Maestral winds (Northwest wind that blows in the summer).
Perfect for sailing and I love to sail.
- Favourite drink: Local Croatian wine, particularly if it is home made.  
- Favourite thing about Corsario: The opportunity to meet new people and show them the beauties of our home. To the new guests, all I can say is - You will be happy to get to know us.

crew.name: Luka Vulić
crew.bio:
Very frequently guests are surprised with levels of the food that we serve on Corsario and it is Luka's "fault". This incredibly talented chef, comes from a small little coastal town - Omiš, where Corsario's roots are too.
 
Luka had years of international cheffing experience at the very beginning of his career, after which he came back to Croatia and worked as a head chef in some of the best fine dining restaurants on the  island Hvar and in Split. After years of restaurant experience, he became a chef in newly built exclusive hotel in his home town, where he stayed for 2 years.  Finally, he came to work on Corsario and this will be his 6th year serving beautiful dishes on charters. 

In October 2024, Luka won prestigious award - 2nd place at CROYA Chef’s Competition, among many other chefs!

We are so happy to have him as one of our leaders among the crew.

FUN FACTS:
- Favourite Food: Seafood risotto
- Best place in Croatia: Omiš - it has an extraordinary combination of sea,
mountain and river. People there are so welcoming and nice.
- Favourite fish: Sea bass by far
- Favourite drink: Lots of coffee!
- Favourite thing about Corsario: I do believe we go above and beyond to show the guests the best of Croatia. Personally, I love showing them authentic Croatian dishes and pointing out how easily we get fresh, local and  organic products here. Food tastes so much better, just because of its local origin.

crew.name: Dario Topić
crew.bio:
When you go through Corsario feedback in our book of impressions, Dario might be the name that repeats the most, along with Jure and Luka. His warm personality and attention to detail are great, but what really makes him perfect for this job is his humour and witty jokes that will draw a smile on your face even when you don't expect it. 

Dario has outstanding knowledge of Croatian wines and wines in general, admirable cocktail making skills and many ideas for organising themed nights for the guests.

His extensive working experience in 5 star hotels and some fine dining restaurants gave him not just great skills and interest in the service industry, but also a deep knowledge of the local bar and restaurants. So in case you need recommendation for restaurants and bars, he is the person to ask. 

In 2024 he won prestigious award - 1st place at the Designer Water Competition at the first CROYA event, among many other yachts. His skills outshined the rest.
We are so proud to have him with us, 6 years running!  

FUN FACTS:
- Favourite food: I love pasta.
- Best island in Croatia: Hvar!
- Favourite cocktail: Negroni.
- Favourite drink: Freshly squeezed lemonade.
- Favourite thing about Corsario: I love making people happy and also this job makes me happy. Guests are often surprised about Croatia being amongst the finest of what Mediterranean has to offer. To many of them it is still a hidden gem.

crew.name: Marin Brekalo
crew.bio:
Marin is the youngest member on board. This is his 3rd year sailing and 2nd on Corsario. 
The Crew love him because he is humble and eager to learn. His job is on deck - from water toys, navigational operations to taking care of cleanliness of the exterior part. However, if anyone needs any help - in the galley, in the service department, or anywhere - he is there to help. He loves working with captain Jure for many reasons  but mainly he wants to gain from Jure's wealth of knowledge. 

Marin fell in love with the sea and he sees his career only on boats. One day he hopes to become a captain. His warm personality fits well on Corsario.

crew.name: Tonci Zulin
crew.bio:
Tonći was born on the island of Hvar, which remains his favourite island on the Adriatic. He is known among the crew as a versatile colleague, who's general knowledge is vast and varied. 

Tonći will take care of cleanliness on the deck, navigational operations, water toys and transfers to wherever you need to go with a dinghy. During the winter time, Tonci sails on big explorer ships over the ocean. His summers are currently reserved for Corsario. He loves working with people and Corsario with her unique design, remains his favourite yacht on the Adriatic. This is Tonci's 4th year on board.

crew.name: Ivana Bralic
crew.bio:
Ivana is our new full time addition to the crew! She is very familiar with Corsario as she used to join some charters as a sous chef in the passed and the crew and guests loved having her around.
Besides being Luka’s great friend and former co-worker, Ivana is known as one of the best pastry chefs in Croatia. With lots of international experience, years of education and great references, Corsario's galley will be producing even more extraordinary dishes.

Ivana's warm personality, always with a smile is a perfect addition to the Corsario team.

crew.name: Nensi Krolo
crew.bio:
The warmest smile on Corsario, even though competition is hard, belongs to Nensi! Nensi has been in the team for 4 years and this is her 2nd season on Corsario.
Nensi's main responsibilities are to help at the bar, on the deck, and to do the housekeeping. Housekeeping is what Nensi loves the most. She takes care of the cabins, laundry and interior in general and she keeps it in an impeccable state, adding a lot of charm to it with thoughtful details. 

Nensi loves dancing, music and hanging out with friends. She loves extreme sports and has taken up climbing. She adores Corsario mostly because of the people that she works with.
